 {"id":"bd-9zov","title":"demo_showcase: export current view (plain + HTML)","description":"Stretch feature to show off lipgloss backends.

Implement an action that:
- exports the current rendered view to plain text (strip ANSI)
- optionally exports to HTML via lipgloss Html backend (if available) for sharing/screenshots

Acceptance:
- Produces deterministic output for docs/CI artifacts and demonstrates backend abstraction.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:07:32.959409955Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:09.471395576Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","lipgloss"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-9zov","depends_on_id":"bd-3mh2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:09.471365170Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-9zov","depends_on_id":"bd-cakm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:08.280564966Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-9zov","depends_on_id":"bd-szmb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:07:32.976032713Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ab35","title":"demo_showcase core: App model + routing + message taxonomy","description":"Design + implement the top-level `App` model.

Define:
- AppState: current page, focus target, global toggles (animations/mouse), theme, notifications.
- Message taxonomy: routeable app messages vs component messages; minimize ad-hoc `Any` downcasts.
- Routing: an enum of pages + a clean delegation pattern (App calls page.update/view).

Acceptance:
- Adding a new page is "mechanical": implement a page model and register it in router.
- Message routing is understandable and testable.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:07:56.311481194Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:11.958958703Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["architecture","bubbletea","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ab35","depends_on_id":"bd-33mv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:11.958931843Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-ab35","depends_on_id":"bd-3j9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:07:56.340015687Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-ab35","depends_on_id":"bd-cakm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:10.685669509Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"bd-cakm","title":"demo_showcase: create crate + wire into workspace","description":"Implementation task.

Create `crates/demo_showcase` as a binary crate and add it to the workspace.

Key decisions to encode in Cargo.toml:
- Dependencies: bubbletea (+ optional async), lipgloss, bubbles, glamour, huh, harmonica, charmed_log.
- Optional deps for SSH mode: wish.
- Optional deps for markdown syntax highlighting: glamour feature.
- Keep feature flags explicit so the binary can be built in "minimal" mode if needed.

Acceptance:
- `cargo check -p demo_showcase` succeeds.
- `cargo run -p demo_showcase` launches (even if it is a placeholder screen initially).","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:07:29.751684016Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:07:29.766542562Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["build","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-cakm","depends_on_id":"bd-szmb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:07:29.766497808Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-dd6s","title":"Fix table rendering width calculation in glamour","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T22:36:23.612261459Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T22:36:47.698097353Z","closed_at":"2026-01-19T22:36:47.698049583Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-dkff","title":"demo_showcase page: Dashboard (metrics, status, animations)","description":"The flagship “wow” page: a premium monitoring-style dashboard that immediately communicates polish, usefulness, and technical depth.

Why:
- First impressions matter: on first launch, the dashboard should make the project look inevitable.
- A dashboard is the best place to integrate *everything at once*: layout, styling, animation, real-time updates, and drill-down.

What this page must showcase (integrated):
- lipgloss: dense but readable card/grid layout, borders, alignment, width-aware wrapping/truncation, theme slots.
- bubbles: progress/spinner widgets embedded in cards, a compact table/list for “top incidents / hot services”, viewport for detail text.
- harmonica: smooth animated counters/progress (deltas, easing), attention cues (subtle pulse on state changes).
- bubbletea: timed updates (tick), resize responsiveness, optional mouse interactions.
- charmed_log/toasts: state transitions emit a toast/alert and optionally log an event.

Core UX requirements:
- Multiple “cards” with distinct semantics (e.g., Requests, Latency, Error Rate, Job Throughput, Incidents).
- Visible health states (ok/warn/error) with consistent color + iconography.
- Drill-down: selecting/clicking a card opens a modal/panel with detail + explanation.
- Responsive: reflow to 1-column / 2-column / 3-column depending on terminal width.

Data requirements:
- Driven by the deterministic simulation engine (seeded) so demos/tests are reproducible.
- Includes plausible trends (up/down arrows), thresholds, and at least one periodic “incident”.

Acceptance:
- Looks and feels like a production ops dashboard.
- Values visibly change over time without flicker or input lag.
- State transitions are obvious (animated + toast), but never noisy.

Testing:
- Unit tests:
  - health-state derivation (thresholds + hysteresis if used)
  - trend calculation (delta over N ticks)
  - responsive layout breakpoints (given width/height)
- E2E:
  - covered by smoke tour
  - additional assertions in the settings/theme scenario should confirm dashboard updates immediately after theme/toggle changes.

Notes:
- Prefer “information clarity” motion (animate toward truth) over gratuitous animation.
- Keep all motion disable-able via `--no-animations` / reduce motion.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:09:15.448098103Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:41:26.104455680Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["dashboard","demo_showcase","page"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-dkff","depends_on_id":"bd-2pzh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:09:15.462915847Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
